title: AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Various Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has officially announced the notification for the recruitment of various Project Research Scientist I Posts. Candidates with a post-graduation can apply for the AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online before the last date of application. If you...
